_note: Seed set of real Bangkok drainage assets (สำนักการระบายน้ำ กทม.). Coordinates are APPROXIMATE (approx: true) — the stations adapter attempts to replace them with official geometry from data.bangkok.go.th / data.go.th at runtime and keeps whatever it can verify. capacity_cms values are indicative. downstream = shared discharge node used by the coordination rule (CP-N/C/S = Chao Phraya north/central/south reach, EAST = eastern outfall toward ลาดกระบัง/บางปะกง).
